mapper.insert:
select doc_seq.nextval from dual
insert into draft_documents values (#{doc_seq}, #{title}, #{doc_type}, #{users_id}, sysdate, 'DRAFT', null, 0, null, sysdate, null)
insert into approval_lines values (line_seq.nextval, #{doc_seq}, #{users_id}, #{step_order}, #{status}, null, null)

select pay_seq.nextval from dual
insert into payment values (#{pay_seq}, #{doc_seq}, #{pay_date}, #{total_amount}, #{pay_reason}, #{account_info})

select purchase_seq.nextval from dual
insert into purchase values (#{purchase_seq}, #{doc_seq}, #{total_amount}, #{purpose}, #{vendor}, #{purchase_date})
mapper.select: select d.*, u.name as name from draft_documents d inner join users u on d.users_id = u.id inner join approval_cc c on d.doc_seq = c.doc_seq where c.users_id = #{loginId} order by d.created_at desc

select a.line_seq, a.doc_seq, a.users_id, a.step_order, a.status, a.handle_at, a.reject_reason, u.name as name, r.rank_name as rank_name, u.sysname as sysname
from approval_lines a inner join users u on a.users_id = u.id inner join rank r on u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq where a.doc_seq = #{doc_seq} order by a.step_order
